landing.text:

Try Korey
Where software teams
plan & Build Products
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Get Started - free forever
Free forever. No credit card required.
Trusted by thousands of software teams
Product Development
Task tracking and sprints
Easily
create & track
development work.
Track your work from early stage to planning, execution and release. Customize workflows, view and filter spaces, and keep work moving.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Key Features
Product Planning
Quickly
view progress
, each day.
Map out projects across teams, communicate health status, and share target dates.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Key Features
Just Launched
strategic Planning
Connect Work to
Goals.
Create goals, align teams, and connect individual projects to company objectives.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Objectives
Customizations
Work the way you want.
Just enough customization to keep things simple but flexible to adapt to how your team works.
Get started - it’s free
View Customizations
Sprints
Quickly prioritize and keep track of the work your team needs to be focused on week-to-week with Iterations.
Work In Progress Limits
Set Story limits in each workflow state to stop work from piling up and keep everything moving smoothly.
Custom Fields
Leverage custom fields to help you establish a more structured process for you and your teams.
Speed & Efficiency
Quick load times combined with keyboard shortcuts let you work faster than ever.
VCS Automations
Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools mean Shortcut updates while you work.
Git Workflows
Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools mean Shortcut updates while you work.
Try Korey
The
AI Agent
for
product development.
Accelerate your product engineering workflows. Move from idea to spec to PR in minutes.
Try Korey
Shortcut for Agents
Work side-by-side with AI to scope tasks, write PRs, and track progress right in Shortcut.
Shortcut MCP Server
Connect Shortcut to tools like Cursor and Claude Code to get agents coding and synced to GitHub.
Integrations
Connect to your entire workflow
From GitHub to Slack to Sentry, you can
integrate Shortcut with tools you love.
Get started - it’s free
View Integrations
Security
Built for scale and security
Shortcut scales with your team with best-in-class features, security, and privacy. Scale without friction - whether you're a "team" of 1 or an org of 1,000+
Get started - it’s free
Learn more
GDPR and SOC2 compliant
|
Google SSO included for all plans
|
SSO and SCIM available
|
HIPAA & BAA Ready
Customers
What our customers have to say.
We love our users because they love us. Check out some of the love they’ve sent our way.
Read All Customer Stories
Shortcut is a project management platform that's simple to use and also has the functionality to help with prioritization and collaboration.
Arnaud Pichery
,
VP of Engineering, Dataiku
,
We unified the whole organization under a single umbrella, but the different teams still have the freedom and flexibility to work how they want.
Tom Randle
,
CEO, Geckoboard

next
.
Experience the most enjoyable, powerful way for your team to work.

Just Launched
Frequently Asked Questions
Some questions about Shortcut are asked frequently. We've answered the most frequent of those frequent questions below.
What can I expect each billing cycle if I'm on the yearly Team or Business Plan?
For these plans, we use metered billing, which means we charge you per user, per month during your yearly billing cycle.
We want to cancel our subscription. Can we get a refund?
Shortcut does not offer pro-rated refunds for cancelled subscriptions.
How do I add a credit card in Shortcut?
To add a credit card, go to
Settings > Workspace > Billing
, and update your billing information in the Card section. It’s always a good idea to review and update your billing contact information while you’re there.
What happens when the trial period ends?
If you have 10 or fewer users when the trial ends, you can simply use Shortcut for free or manually choose one of our paid plans to get access to the features included within it. If you have more than 10 users and want to continue using Shortcut after your trial ends, subscribe to one of our paid plans.
Do I have to wait until the end of the trial to subscribe to a paid plan?
Nope! You are welcome to add a credit card at any time, but you won’t be charged until your 14-day Trial is over.
What can I do in Shortcut during the 14-day trial period?
Anything! The Shortcut Trial is meant to give you an opportunity to truly test Shortcut’s features and to build processes that work for your team. You’ll have full access to Shortcut as a robust tool, including (but definitely not limited to): an Organization with unlimited
Workspaces
and
user management
, unlimited
Observer users
,
our API
, and
outgoing webhooks
. Feel free to experiment with using Teams, Epics and Objectives, Stories, Labels, and Custom Workflows together to create a project management environment unique and useful to your team.
For more billing information, check out our
Help Center.
But wait, there’s more....
Shortcut is honored to extend a full membership at no cost to eligible Nonprofit organizations as thanks for the hard work.
The Shortcut
Nonprofit
Plan
Shortcut is free for qualifying nonprofits. Thank you for the hard work your team does to make the world a better place.
Apply Now
The Shortcut Startup Program
Get 12 months free if your startup has fewer than 50 employees. Open to all startups, regardless of VC-fund or accelerator affiliation.
Get started now
Build what’s
next
.
Experience the most enjoyable, powerful way for your team to work.

analysis.name: Shortcut
analysis.tagline: Where software teams plan & Build Products
analysis.value_proposition: Fast, enjoyable project management platform for software teams combining issue tracking, sprints, roadmaps, and AI agent collaboration.
analysis.ideal_customer: Software engineering and product teams at growth-stage companies seeking a lighter-weight alternative to Jira with built-in AI agent support.

features.name: kanban boards
features.description: Customized kanban views of stories with saved filters per space
features.evidence_quote: Plan work with Kanban views

features.name: roadmaps
features.description: Timeline view visualizing epics and communicating health status and target dates
features.evidence_quote: Visualize Epics on a Roadmap

features.name: sprints / iterations
features.description: Time-boxed development periods grouping a collection of stories
features.evidence_quote: Define a time-boxed period of development for a collection of Stories

features.name: backlog
features.description: Dedicated view to sort, manage, and prioritize work before it enters a workflow
features.evidence_quote: Better sort, manage and prioritize work before it makes its way into a Workflow

features.name: docs
features.description: Built-in collaborative documents for PRDs, technical documentation, and planning
features.evidence_quote: Use Docs for PRDs, technical documentation, and much more

features.name: docs templates
features.description: Reusable document templates for common doc types
features.evidence_quote: Docs and Docs Templates

features.name: docs suggestion mode
features.description: Allows collaborators to propose changes to docs rather than edit directly
features.evidence_quote: Allow Doc collaborators to see what changes are proposed

features.name: automations
features.description: Rule-based automation to manage repetitive tasks and workflow triggers
features.evidence_quote: Manage repetitive tasks with Automations

features.name: stories and epics
features.description: Core work item hierarchy: stories for individual tasks, epics for larger initiatives
features.evidence_quote: Stories and Epics

features.name: spaces / filtered boards
features.description: Multiple board views scoped by team or filter within a workflow
features.evidence_quote: Spaces/Boards — Customized views of your Stories on Kanban with saved filters

features.name: work in progress limits
features.description: Per-workflow-state story count caps to prevent bottlenecks
features.evidence_quote: Set limit on Stories in progress to keep work moving smoothly

features.name: customizable workflows
features.description: Configurable workflow states for how stories move from creation to completion
features.evidence_quote: Customize the way Stories move from creation to completion

features.name: custom fields and labels
features.description: User-defined fields (basic on Team, advanced on Business) to categorize and structure work
features.evidence_quote: Categorize your work using basic Custom Fields (Technical Area, Skill Se[t])

features.name: tactical objectives
features.description: Group and track epics related to releases and near-term work
features.evidence_quote: Group and track Epics related to releases and work

features.name: strategic objectives and key results
features.description: OKR-style goal tracking connecting key results and epics to business outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Group and track Key Results and related Epics connected to business outcomes and goals

features.name: epic and iteration reports
features.description: Visual progress reports for epics and sprint iterations
features.evidence_quote: Visualize progress on Epics and Iterations

features.name: metrics dashboard
features.description: Full reporting suite including velocity, ARC chart, cycle time, lead time, and cumulative flow
features.evidence_quote: Access Metrics dashboard, Velocity chart, ARC Chart, Cycle Time / Lead Time, Cumulative Flow Diagram

features.name: advanced reports
features.description: Extended reporting beyond 100 days plus time-spent-in-workflow-state and created-vs-completed charts
features.evidence_quote: Create reports beyond 100 days and access reports like Time Spent in Workflow State and Created vs. Completed

features.name: multiple workspaces
features.description: Separate workspaces for sandboxing, sensitive projects, or agency client separation
features.evidence_quote: Multiple Workspaces for sandboxing

features.name: teams organization
features.description: Organize users into teams and squads (1 free, up to 5 team plan, unlimited business+)
features.evidence_quote: Organize users into teams and squads

features.name: github integration
features.description: Attach commits, branches, and PRs to stories; auto-update story state via git activity
features.evidence_quote: Attach commits, branches and PRs to Stories.

features.name: gitlab integration
features.description: Attach commits, branches, and merge requests to stories
features.evidence_quote: Attach commits, branches and merge requests.

features.name: bitbucket integration
features.description: Attach commits, branches, and PRs to stories from Bitbucket Cloud
features.evidence_quote: Attach commits, branches and PRs to Stories.

features.name: vcs automations
features.description: Automatic story state updates triggered by GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket git events
features.evidence_quote: Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools mean Shortcut updates while you work

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Create new stories from Slack and receive story notifications in Slack channels
features.evidence_quote: Create new Stories from Slack, and more!

features.name: figma integration
features.description: Embed live Figma file previews directly in stories
features.evidence_quote: Turn any link to a public Figma file.

features.name: api
features.description: Open REST API for custom integrations and data retrieval
features.evidence_quote: Create custom integrations and send/retrieve data with our open API.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server exposing workspace data to AI coding tools like Claude Code and Cursor
features.evidence_quote: MCP Server — Access your workspace data in a simple and secure way.

features.name: ai agent collaboration
features.description: Collaborate with AI agent teammates directly inside Shortcut workflows
features.evidence_quote: AI Agent Collaboration — Collaborate with AI teammates in Shortcut

features.name: korey ai agent
features.description: Dedicated AI agent product for accelerating product engineering workflows within Shortcut
features.evidence_quote: Korey — AI agent for product engineering workflows.

features.name: devin integration
features.description: Assign Shortcut stories to Devin AI to scope work and auto-create PRs
features.evidence_quote: Scope work and create PRs by assigning Stories to Devin.

features.name: outgoing webhooks
features.description: Trigger external actions on story events via configurable outbound webhook calls
features.evidence_quote: Registering Outgoing Webhooks (API)

features.name: csv importer
features.description: Bulk import stories and data via CSV upload
features.evidence_quote: CSV Importer

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Comprehensive keyboard shortcut support for faster navigation and actions
features.evidence_quote: Quick load times combined with keyboard shortcuts let you work faster than ever.

features.name: search operators
features.description: Advanced search syntax for filtering stories and content across the workspace
features.evidence_quote: Commonly searched topics: spaces, github, search operators

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on authentication via enterprise identity providers
features.evidence_quote: SSO and SCIM

features.name: scim
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol
features.evidence_quote: SSO and SCIM

features.name: volume discounts
features.description: Predictable pricing with seat-based volume discounts at enterprise scale
features.evidence_quote: Predictable pricing with volume discounts

features.name: premier support sla
features.description: Guaranteed response-time SLAs for enterprise support tickets
features.evidence_quote: Premier support SLAs

features.name: dedicated slack channel
features.description: Private shared Slack channel with Shortcut team for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated Slack channel

features.name: onboarding support
features.description: Guided onboarding assistance from Shortcut team for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Onboarding Support

features.name: custom terms
features.description: Negotiated contract terms and DPA for enterprise agreements
features.evidence_quote: Custom Terms

features.name: loom integration
features.description: Embed Loom video recordings in stories, comments, and docs
features.evidence_quote: Embed Loom videos in Stories, Comments and Docs.

features.name: google drive integration
features.description: Link and preview Google Drive files directly in stories
features.evidence_quote: Link files stored in Google Drive directly.

features.name: google calendar integration
features.description: Visualize Shortcut story due dates on Google Calendar
features.evidence_quote: Visualize the due dates of your Shortcut Stories.

features.name: google sheets integration
features.description: Export story data to Google Sheets for custom reporting and analysis
features.evidence_quote: Connect for custom reporting and analysis.

features.name: notion integration
features.description: Display live Shortcut story link previews embedded inside Notion pages
features.evidence_quote: Add live link previews into your Notion docs.

features.name: miro integration
features.description: Connect Miro boards for real-time collaborative planning alongside stories
features.evidence_quote: Connect Miro for real-time collaboration.

features.name: bugsnag integration
features.description: Automatically capture site errors from Bugsnag and create Shortcut stories
features.evidence_quote: Capture site errors reported from Bugsnag.

features.name: firehydrant integration
features.description: Create or sync incident and action items from FireHydrant into Shortcut
features.evidence_quote: Create or sync incidents and action items created.

features.name: productboard integration
features.description: Push prioritized product plans from Productboard directly into Shortcut development
features.evidence_quote: Automatically push plans to development in Shortcut.

features.name: linearb integration
features.description: Measure engineering performance and fix process bottlenecks using LinearB analytics
features.evidence_quote: Fix process bottlenecks and measure performance.

features.name: clockify integration
features.description: Track time spent on individual stories with one-click Clockify timer
features.evidence_quote: Track time on Stories with just one click.

features.name: everhour integration
features.description: One-click time tracking on stories via Everhour
features.evidence_quote: Track time on tasks with just one click.

features.name: zapier / ifttt / make automation
features.description: Connect Shortcut to hundreds of external apps via automation platforms
features.evidence_quote: Connect Shortcut to 1000+ apps

features.name: aikido security integration
features.description: Auto-create Shortcut stories for security findings surfaced by Aikido
features.evidence_quote: Create Shortcut Stories for security findings.

features.name: lambdatest integration
features.description: File browser testing issues directly to Shortcut from LambdaTest
features.evidence_quote: File browser testing issues to Shortcut directly.

features.name: fireflies integration
features.description: Convert Fireflies meeting action items into Shortcut stories automatically
features.evidence_quote: Turn Fireflies meeting action items into Shortcut Stories

features.name: plain integration

features.evidence_quote: Create and link Stories, and close the loop with customers.

features.name: glean integration
features.description: Search Shortcut content from within Glean for instant cross-tool insights
features.evidence_quote: Search Shortcut for instant insights

features.name: claude code integration
features.description: Connect Claude Code AI coding agent to Shortcut via the MCP Server
features.evidence_quote: Connect Claude Code to the Shortcut MCP Server

features.name: cursor integration
features.description: Connect Cursor AI IDE to Shortcut via the MCP Server
features.evidence_quote: Connect Cursor to the Shortcut MCP Server

differentiators: Free forever plan with no credit card required
AI agent (Korey) purpose-built for product engineering workflows
Native MCP Server enabling AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor) to read workspace data
Agent Coordination feature for collaborating with AI teammates inside the platform
Explicitly positioned as faster and simpler alternative to Jira, Trello, and Pivotal Tracker
Speed emphasis: 'Quick load times combined with keyboard shortcuts let you work faster than ever'
Devin AI integration for autonomous PR creation from assigned stories

recent_ships.what: Korey — AI agent for product engineering workflows (marked New across all nav)
recent_ships.source: landing: 'Korey — AI agent for product engineering workflows. New'

recent_ships.what: Agent Coordination — collaborate with AI teammates inside Shortcut
recent_ships.source: landing: 'Agent Coordination — Collaborate with AI teammates. New'

recent_ships.what: Strategic Objectives and Key Results — OKR tracking connected to business goals
recent_ships.source: landing: 'Just Launched — strategic Planning — Connect Work to Goals.'

recent_ships.what: MCP Server — workspace data access for AI tools
recent_ships.source: pricing: 'MCP Server — Access your workspace data in a simple and secure way.'

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 users, kanban, roadmap, iterations, docs, basic reports, GitHub/Slack/Figma integrations

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited users, full reports, WIP limits, automations, multiple workflows, all integrations

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited workspaces, strategic OKRs, advanced custom fields, advanced reports, unlimited everything

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: SSO, SCIM, volume discounts, premier support SLAs, dedicated Slack channel, custom terms

pricing.notes: Monthly pricing: Team $10/seat, Business $16/seat (one data point in comparison table shows $14 for Business monthly — possible A/B test or display bug). Yearly saves ~15% on Team, ~25% on Business. Free plan capped at 10 users total.
